cases.description: Annapurna Labs designs silicon and software that accelerates innovation. cases.description: About the Team The Applied team works across research, engineering, product, and design to bring OpenAI’s technology to the world. About the Role A systems research internship is for people who love the real-world intersection of systems-engineering and research: you’ll investigate a hard systems problem, build something meaningful, and measure it carefully. OpenAI is currently recruiting for candidates interested in a 13-week, paid, in-person internship based in our San Francisco office during Summer 2026.
